case_title: STEVEN C CLYDE VS. AUERBACH, POLLAK & RICHARDSON, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLYDE, STEVEN C AS TO DEFENDANT AUERBACH, POLLAK & RICHARDSON, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLYDE, STEVEN C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUERBACH, POLLAK & RICHARDSON, INC. $23,884.13 PRINCIPAL, $74.97 INTEREST, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,070.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
